basic_details.short_information: Rajasthan State Legal Services Authority (RSLSA) Recruitment 2026 for 69 posts of Panel Advocate. Candidates Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 15-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through RSLSA official website.

qualification.education_qualification: Registered with Bar Council of Rajasthan, Minimum 3 years continuous practice as advocate

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for RSLSA Panel Advocate Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: RSLSA Panel Advocate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 69 Posts
